VACCINE_DESCRIPTION: Tdap (Tetanus, diphtheria for older children and adults and acellular pertussis) vaccine
SOURCECOMMENT: Tdap is recommended for: a) pregnant women in the second or third trimester of pregnancy if pertussis is registered in an epidemic form and if newborns and infants up to four months of age are significantly affected. The recommended period for immunization is from the 27th to the 36th week of each pregnancy, or in accordance with the manufacturer's instructions; b) healthcare workers working in maternity wards, as well as pediatric wards for newborns and infants, in the event of an epidemic and if they have not been immunized in the previous three years; c) recipients of bone marrow stem cell transplants.
VACCINEDESCRIPTION: Tdap (Tetanus, diphtheria for older children and adults and acellular pertussis) vaccine
